title: Chain 1/8: Buy a Metro Card
scene: 你第一次去纽约坐地铁，在窗口买 MetroCard。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 你好，我想买一张地铁卡。
turns.en: Hi, I'd like to buy a MetroCard.

turns.cn: 充多少？单次 ride 两点七五。
turns.en: How much do you want to load? Each ride is two seventy-five.
Twenty dollars, please.
Card or cash is fine.
Which line goes to Times Square?

turns.cn: 坐 N 线或 R 线，往北方向。
turns.en: Take the N or R train heading uptown.

title: Chain 2/8: Ask for Directions
scene: 你进了地铁站，不确定往哪边走。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，去时代广场的 N 线在哪边？
turns.en: Excuse me, which way to the uptown N train?
Go downstairs and turn left. Follow the signs.

turns.cn: 谢谢，这是往曼哈顿方向吗？
turns.en: Thanks. Is this toward Manhattan?
Yes. Don't go the wrong way.
Got it.

title: Chain 3/8: On the Train
scene: 地铁上广播太快，你没听清，问旁边的人。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.en: Sorry, what did the announcement say?

turns.cn: 下一站四十二街，可以换乘。
turns.en: Next stop Forty-Second Street. You can transfer there.

turns.cn: 我要去时代广场，这站下吗？
turns.en: I'm going to Times Square. Get off here?

turns.cn: 再一站，时代广场是下一站。
turns.en: One more stop. Times Square is next.
Thank you!

title: Chain 4/8: Missed Your Stop
scene: 你不小心坐过了站，向工作人员求助。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.en: Excuse me, I missed my stop.
Which stop were you supposed to get off at?
The last one, Twenty-Eighth Street.

turns.cn: 下一站下车，走对面站台坐回去。
turns.en: Get off at the next stop and cross to the opposite platform.
Do I need to swipe my card again?

turns.cn: 不用，两小时内换乘免费。
turns.en: No, transfers are free within two hours.

title: Chain 5/8: Transfer to Bus
scene: 出了地铁站，你要转公交去博物馆。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 这辆车到大都会博物馆吗？
turns.en: Does this bus go to the Met Museum?

turns.cn: 对，请刷卡或投币两块二五。
turns.en: Yes. Please tap your card or pay two twenty-five.

turns.cn: 请在第五大道让我下车。
turns.en: Could you let me off at Fifth Avenue?
Sure. I'll call it out when we get there.
How long will it take?
About twenty minutes, depending on traffic.

title: Chain 6/8: Forgot to Tap
scene: 下车时你发现忘了刷卡，问司机怎么办。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.en: Sorry, I forgot to tap when I got on.

turns.cn: 现在刷也行，或者下次补。
turns.en: You can tap now, or make it up next time.
I'll tap now.
All set. Remember next time.
Thanks for the reminder.

title: Chain 7/8: Last Stop Directions
scene: 公交到站，你问路人博物馆入口在哪。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 打扰一下，大都会博物馆入口怎么走？
turns.en: Excuse me, how do I get to the Met entrance?

turns.cn: 往前两个路口，大台阶那边。
turns.en: Two blocks ahead, by the big steps.
How long on foot?
Five minutes. You can't miss it.
Thank you!

title: Chain 8/8: Check Card Balance
scene: 回家路上，你在地铁站查 MetroCard 余额。（对话链：公交地铁）

turns.cn: 能帮我查一下卡里还剩多少吗？
turns.en: Can you check my card balance?

turns.cn: 插进去……还剩六块五，够两次。
turns.en: Insert it. Six fifty left. Enough for two rides.
I'll reload tomorrow then.
The machines reload too. No line needed.
Okay. Thanks.
